files.content:
# Deep Market Researcher

Multi-stage research, synthesis, critique and validation pipeline for market questions.

## How to improve

1. Fork this harness.
2. Change one agent prompt or eval case.
3. Run `hh validate && hh eval && hh gate`.
4. Open PR and read the semantic diff.

Find weak assumptions, contradictions, missing sources and overclaiming.

Rules:
- Be concrete and source-backed.
- State uncertainty directly.
- Do not invent external tool access.

Turn research into a structured answer with clear evidence and gaps.

Rules:
- Be concrete and source-backed.
- State uncertainty directly.
- Do not invent external tool access.

Collect source-backed market evidence and name confidence limits.

Rules:
- Be concrete and source-backed.
- State uncertainty directly.
- Do not invent external tool access.

title: maps competitor set with caveats
score: 0.88

title: separates source-backed facts from assumptions
score: 0.9

title: flags contradiction before final memo
score: 0.86

description: Deep Market Researcher smoke eval
prompts:
  - agents/critic.md
providers:
  - echo

# Expected

The memo identifies direct and adjacent alternatives, separates builders from registries, and marks validation gaps.

# Input

Research the market for AI workflow registries used by agent engineers.

schemaVersion: harness.v0.2
name: deep-market-researcher
title: Deep Market Researcher
summary: Multi-stage research, synthesis, critique and validation pipeline for
  market questions.
version: 0.2.1
license: MIT
source:
  upstream_url: https://github.com/elvismusli/onlyharness/tree/main/seed-harnesses/deep-market-researcher
  upstream_license: MIT
  attribution: OnlyHarness first-party instruction harness
  authors:
    - OnlyHarness
  vendor_policy: original
maintainers:
  - name: Harness.Hub Local
tags:
  - research
  - strategy
  - validation
runtime:
  primary: none
  adapters: []
inputs:
  - id: request
    type: markdown
    required: true
outputs:
  - id: final_result
    type: markdown
agents:
  - id: web_researcher
    role: source_research
    title: Web Researcher
    prompt: agents/web_researcher.md
    tools:
      - web_search
    handoffs: []
  - id: synthesizer
    role: synthesize_findings
    title: Synthesizer
    prompt: agents/synthesizer.md
    tools: []
    handoffs: []
  - id: critic
    role: critique_and_validate
    title: Critic
    prompt: agents/critic.md
    tools: []
    handoffs: []
workflow:
  entrypoint: web_researcher
  stages:
    - id: research
      agent: web_researcher
    - id: synthesis
      agent: synthesizer
    - id: critique
      agent: critic
    - id: final
      agent: synthesizer
tools:
  mcp_servers:
    - id: web_search
      required: false
      package: "@modelcontextprotocol/server-web-search"
      pinned: true
      allowlist:
        - api.openai.com
  function_tools: []
  external_apis: []
permissions:
  network: allowlist
  network_allowlist:
    - api.openai.com
  filesystem: readonly
  shell: false
  browser: false
  credentials: runtime_injected
  external_send: false
  money_movement: false
  user_data: false
  human_approval_required:
    - external_send
    - money_movement
secrets:
  required: []
  optional: []
evals:
  promptfoo_config: evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
  command: npx promptfoo@latest eval -c evals/promptfooconfig.yaml -o
    .harnesshub/results.json -o .harnesshub/report.html -o
    .harnesshub/results.junit.xml
quality_gates:
  min_score: 0.82
  max_regression: 0.03
  max_cost_usd_per_run: 3
  max_risk_score: 39
  required_checks:
    - schema_valid
    - eval_passed
    - no_high_risk_permission_delta
examples:
  - title: Smoke example
    input: examples/input.md
    output: examples/expected.md

# Local run

```bash
hh validate
hh eval
hh gate
```
